name: Chipotle Cornbread
recipeIngredient: Enough non-stick cooking spray to grease a 6-inch cast iron skillet or an 8-inch pie pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees F (232 C). Grease two 6-inch cast iron skillets or one 8-inch pie pan with non-stick cooking spray and place them in the oven to heat while preheating.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder. Stir in the egg whites, buttermilk, soy milk, apple sauce, and pureed chipotles until well mixed.
3. Grease the prepared skillet or pie pan with non-stick cooking spray. Pour the batter into the preheated skillet or evenly distribute it in the pie pan, filling it to about three-fourths full. Bake for 25 minutes, or until the cornbread is golden brown around the edges and firm when tested with a knife.
4. Remove the skillet or pie pan from the oven and let cool slightly before cutting each piece into four wedges. Serve warm.
